metadata.description: The free ChatGPT Ads Launch Kit from Sulka Labs, a human-led, AI-driven DTC growth partner.

plugins.name: chatgpt-ads-launch-kit
plugins.description: Build a launch-ready ChatGPT Ads campaign for any brand: ad groups, ad copy, context hints, UTM tracking, ad creative, and a bulk-upload workbook that matches ChatGPT Ads' own template. No API keys, no code.
